text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe King's entering the Takarazuka
Kinen, too! I'll smash her and rise to the top!
Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even Vodka is entering?! It's like a showdown
between Princess Fighter heroines, old and new.
How exhilarating! I have to claim victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the actors have taken the stage, and our race
is about to begin! Care for a
Princess☆Backbreaker?!
